title: Create: Create O' Plenty (Create + Biomes O' Plenty Mod compat)
description: Adds compatibility between Create and Biomes O' Plenty.
body:
*** # **📜About** Create O’Plenty is a small compatibility add-on that bridges **Create** and **Biomes O’ Plenty**, letting you automate BOP’s unique blocks and resources with Create’s machines. (The pictures show some of the features) *** # **⚠️Note** If you’re running **Create 6.0.7** or higher, you might spot some duplicate/additional recipes. The Create team has been adding their own built-in compatibility, which overlaps with what’s here. **Create O Plenty** still brings some unique recipes to the table, so I’ve left them in for now.  I'm planning to focus on a proper fix and some workarounds for this in **Version 3.0**. Until then, It’s totally your call on which ones you prefer to use! *** # **⚙️Features** * Fixes the inability to apply casings to several **stripped woods/logs**. * Adds the missing **Sand Papers**: **Black**, **Orange**, and **White**. * **Compacting** – turn BOP'**s Sands into rocks**, or craft a **Flesh Block** using **100 mb of Blood** as an alternative recipe. * **Crushing** – **BOP sandstones**, **Flesh and Porous Flesh Blocks**, **Rose Quartz blocks and clusters**, **Thermal Calcite and Thermal Vent blocks**, **Brimstone**, and all **BOP flowers and tall flowers** into their components. * **Milling** – provides some early Crushing recipes. **(All except Brimstone and Rose Quartz crushing)** * **Mixing** – make **Thermal Calcite using heat** and form **Create's** **Rose Quartz** from **Mixing BOP's Rose Quartz Chunks using Heat.** (For grind's sake)' *** ### **⚙️Detailed Recipes( unhide the spoiler to see all thew new recipes with their detailed drops)**

COMPACTING RECIPES

•  Diorite
Inputs: 2 Flint + 1 White Sand + 100 mB Lava 

• Scrochia
Inputs: Inputs: 2 Flint + 1 Black Sand + 100 mB Lava

• Flesh Block
Inputs: 4 Rotten Flesh + 100 mB Blood

CRUSHING & MILLING
(Brimstone and Rose Quartz blocks can only be crushed)

Black Sandstone → Black Sand ×1
Orange Sandstone → Orange Sand ×1
White Sandstone → White Sand ×1
Flesh Block → Rotten Flesh ×2, 25% chance Bone Meal ×1
Porous Flesh → Rotten Flesh ×2, 25% chance Bone Meal ×1
Rose Quartz Block → Rose Quartz Chunk ×3, 50% chance +1 Chunk
Rose Quartz Cluster → Rose Quartz Chunk ×7, 50% chance +1 Chunk
Thermal Calcite → 75% chance Bone Meal ×1
Thermal Calcite Vent → 75% chance Bone Meal ×1
Brimstone → Create:Cinder Flour ×1, 20% chance Gold Nugget ×1, 10% chance Gunpowder ×1
White Petals → White Dye ×2, 20% chance Lime Dye ×1
Icy Iris → Light Blue Dye ×2, 20% chance Light Blue Dye ×1
Endbloom → Light Gray Dye ×2, 10% chance Orange Dye ×1
Waterlily → Red Dye ×2, 20% chance Lime Dye ×1, 10% chance Pink Dye ×1
Cattail → Brown Dye ×2, 20% chance Green Dye ×1
White Lavender → White Dye ×2, 20% chance Green Dye ×1
Tall White Lavender → White Dye ×3, 25% chance +2 White Dye, 5% chance +2 Green Dye
Tall Lavender → Purple Dye ×3, 25% chance +2 Purple Dye, 5% chance +2 Green Dye
Goldenrod → Yellow Dye ×3, 25% chance +2 Yellow Dye, 5% chance +2 Lime Dye
Tiny Cactus → Green Dye ×2, 10% chance Green Dye ×1

HEATED PROCESSING
Calcite Block → Thermal Calcite Block (Requires Heat)
2 Rose Quartz Chunks → Create:Rose Quartz (Requires Heat)

*** # **🔧Requirements (minimum)** ### **Forge Requires:** * **Minecraft Forge** 1.20.1 (47.3.0) * **Create** 6.0.0 or newer * **Biomes O’ Plenty** 19.0.0.96 or newer * **Glitchcore** and **Terrablender** (depending on your Biomes O’ Plenty version)\\ * **JEI** for a better experience undefined ### **Neoforge Requires:** * * **Minecraft Forge 1.21.1 (21.1.200)** * **Create 6.0.6 ** or newer * **Biomes O' Plenty 21.1.0 ** or newer * **Glitchcore** and **Terrablender** (depending on your Biomes O’ Plenty version)\\ * **JEI** for a better experience *** *** # **🏆Credits** **Create** by the Create team https://modrinth.com/mod/create **Biomes O’ Plenty** by Forstride https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty *** # ☕ **Support me on Ko-Fi**❤️[Ko-fi.com/eggmain](https://ko-fi.com/eggmain) *** # **🔒 Permissions** **Modpacks:** You are welcome to include **Create O' Plenty** in any public or private modpack. Please provide credit and a link back to the mod’s official page. **Modifications:** You may create addons or modifications to **Create O' Plenty** as long as they are non-commercial and credit the original mod. If you plan to distribute modified versions, please ensure they are clearly labeled as unofficial. **Commercial Use:** **Create O' Plenty** is not to be used for commercial purposes. This includes selling the mod, offering it as part of a paid service, or using it in monetized content without permission. **Attribution:** If you feature **Create O' Plenty** in videos, streams, or other content, please provide proper attribution with a link to the mod’s official page. Feel free to suggest new ideas or report any bugs on the GitHub repository, or contact me directly.
